displayName: The name other users will see
currentPassword: Enter your current password to verify your identity
confirmNewPassword: Re-enter your new password to confirm
email: We'll send a verification link to this address
birthDate: Birth date is used to show and participate in age-restricted events
gender: Gender is used to customize recommendations
birthDateNotEditable: Birth date cannot be changed for security reasons
verifyIdentity: Verify your identity to get a verified badge
confirmPasswordForSecurity: Enter your password to confirm the email change
eventPreferencesDescription: Customize which events appear in your feed
cityForEventDiscovery: Events will be recommended based on this location
searchRadiusDescription: Events within this distance from your city will be shown
addressSearch: Start typing to search for addresses
eventLocationName: Give the location a recognizable name
mapClickInstruction: Click on the map to set the event location
forgotPasswordEmail: Enter the email address associated with your account
resetPasswordToken: This token was sent to your email address
resetPasswordNewPassword: Must be at least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character
eventTitle: Give your event a descriptive title
eventDescription: Describe what your event is about
eventLocation: Where will the event take place?
minAge: Optional - Leave empty for no age restriction
maxAge: Optional - Leave empty for no age restriction
ageRestrictionWithUserAge: The age range is locked to include your age. You can only create events for people in your age group.
imageUrl: Optional - Add a URL to an image for your event
aiProfilePrompt: A tiger as an astronaut on the moon...
aiEventPrompt: A group of people having a picnic in a sunny park during spring
publicEvent: When enabled, everyone can see and join this event
privateEvent: When enabled, only invited users can see this event
onlyVerifiedUsers: When enabled, only verified users can see and join this event
deleteAccountPassword: Enter your current password to confirm account deletion
deleteAccountConfirm: Check this box to confirm you understand what will be deleted
blockReason: Optional - Describe why you are blocking this participant
